title: chrysanthemum leucanthemum subsp. montanum
intro: Chrysanthemum leucanthemum subsp. montanum, also known as the mountain marguerite, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as indigestion and nausea, due to its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum leucanthemum subsp. montanum include soothing the nervous system, reducing fever, and aiding in the relief of rheumatic pain. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used internally to treat various ailments or applied topically to promote healing and reduce inflammation.
